needs_manual.description: Utah Hunt Planner interactive map with unit-level population and harvest statistics, biologist notes
needs_manual.reason: Interactive web application - data is loaded dynamically per unit and cannot be bulk downloaded

needs_manual.description: Additional years of draw odds data (2023 and earlier) available as PDFs
needs_manual.reason: Only 2024 and 2025 were downloaded; earlier years available if needed

notes: Utah DWR provides all draw odds and harvest data in PDF format only - no Excel or CSV files are offered on their website.

The 25_bg-odds.pdf and 24_bg-odds.pdf files contain limited-entry deer AND elk draw odds together in a single report, along with other once-in-a-lifetime species (moose, bison, mountain goat, bighorn sheep).
General-season elk in Utah is an over-the-counter purchase (not drawn), so there are no general-season elk draw odds files. Youth elk is draw-only.
The 2024 big game annual report (24_bg_report.pdf, 14 MB) contains comprehensive population surveys, harvest statistics, and management objectives for all units.
PDF parsing will be required to extract tabular data from these files.
Source index page for draw odds: https://wildlife.utah.gov/bg-odds.html
Source index page for harvest data: https://wildlife.utah.gov/hunting/main-hunting-page/big-game/big-game-harvest-data.html
Source index page for annual reports: https://wildlife.utah.gov/hunting/main-hunting-page/annual-reports.html
